items.name: Sulzer
items.description: Sulzer is a global leader in fluid engineering, specializing in pumping, agitation, mixing, separation and application technologies.

items.name: Repsol Sinopec
items.description: Repsol Sinopec Resources UK is an oil and gas exploration and production company operating in the UK North Sea.

items.name: Cox Marine
items.description: Cox Marine is a leading manufacturer of high-powered diesel outboard engines for commercial, government, and military applications.

items.name: BG Group
items.description: BG Group was a British multinational oil and gas company acquired by Royal Dutch Shell in 2016.

items.name: Staatsolie
items.description: Staatsolie is the state-owned oil company of Suriname, involved in exploration, production, refining, and marketing of oil products.

items.name: The Bristol Port Company
items.description: The Bristol Port Company operates the commercial seaport of Bristol, England, handling various types of cargo and cruise ships.

items.name: Takreer
items.description: Takreer, now part of ADNOC Refining, is a leading refining company in the UAE, processing crude oil and condensate.

items.name: Matthews Daniel
items.description: Matthews Daniel is a global marine insurance consultancy firm, providing surveying and adjusting services to the maritime industry.

items.name: KBR
items.description: KBR is a global engineering, procurement, and construction company, serving the aerospace, defense, and energy sectors.

items.name: BP
items.description: BP is one of the world's leading integrated oil and gas companies, providing fuel, energy, and petrochemical products.

items.name: Aqualisa
items.description: Aqualisa is a UK-based manufacturer of premium showers and smart digital showers, known for innovation in bathroom technology.

items.name: Thames Water
items.description: Thames Water is the UK's largest water and wastewater services company, serving London and the Thames Valley region.
